samples.name: Disable the Tracking Device
samples.playerBrief: Disable the tracker before it transmits your location or becomes unsafe to remove.
samples.gmNotes: Use this as a model for a slicer/mechanic scene. Adjust DCs for party level.

primarySkills.label: Use Computer
primarySkills.notes: Analyze the signal, spoof security, or isolate the transmitter.

primarySkills.label: Knowledge (Technology)
primarySkills.notes: Identify the device architecture and possible safety bypasses.

primarySkills.label: Mechanics
primarySkills.notes: Physically isolate or remove the tracker.

effects.label: Catastrophic Failure
effects.notes: A failed check by 10 or more counts as an additional failure.

effects.label: Restricted Skills
effects.notes: Only the listed technical skills count without GM approval.

effects.label: Timed Challenge
effects.notes: Use the countdown when the tracker is actively transmitting or overheating.

samples.successText: The device is disabled or removed safely.
samples.failureText: The device remains active, transmits, explodes, or forces a costly compromise.
